chain.thought: Explanation: The CPSC toy safety funding is lowest at $11.0 million in 2005, when injuries were reported as 202 (estimate). The highest funding is $13.6 million in 1999, when injuries were 152.

judge_thought:
Explanation:
The CPSC toy safety funding values listed are: 1999 (13.6), 2000 (12.0), 2001 (12.4), 2002 (12.2), 2003 (12.8), 2004 (11.5), and 2005 (11.0). The lowest funding is 11.0 in 2005, when injuries were 202 (estimate). The highest funding is 13.6 in 1999, when injuries were 152. Thus, the injuries in the lowest and highest funding years are 202 (estimate) and 152, respectively, matching the Prediction Answer.
